prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次分别为14212→13507→12442→10069→10506，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年达到近年峰值10069后2025年小幅回落至10506，近5年累计前移约3706名；该校在上海市招生计划持续扩增：2021年13人→2022年17人→2023年17人→2024年29人→2025年34人→2026年45人，2026年较2025年扩招约32.4%，大幅增加招生名额将显著缓解竞争压力，推动位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第62名持续上升至2026年第57名，排名稳步提升，体现学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合，涉及师德调查但处理及时；抖音热度为高热（总排名第7），综合热度约739万，短视频平台曝光量大，张雪峰等教育博主多次推荐该校为"性价比很高的211"，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A（王牌学科）、化学A-、材料科学与工程A-，共3个A-及以上学科，化工领域实力突出，与该校招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等热门专业持续高热推荐，但该校主要招生专业为工科试验班（化工、材料、生物方向），相关大类（生化环材）社会热度为明显劝退，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人大幅增加约35.4%，竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招32.4%这一核心因素，预计位次数字将较2025年基准10506明显增大；但软科排名上升至第57名、抖音高热关注度、211层次优势等因素对位次下移有部分抵消作用。在供需弹性计算值基础上，结合排名上升和热度因素小幅回调，预测2026年最低位次约12515名，区间12015–13015名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含电子信息工程、人工智能、计算机科学与技术）
- 自动化类（含自动化、测控技术与仪器）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院）（含化学工程与工艺英才班、高分子材料与工程精英班、生物工程高精尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）（含高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
- 工科试验班（化工与能源）（含化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程、氢能科学与工程）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）（含机械设计制造及其自动化、过程装备与控制工程、机器人工程）
- 理科试验班（大数据与智能管理）（含信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（绿色化学）（含应用化学、能源化学、资源化学）
- 工科试验班（生物与医药）（含生物工程、生物医学工程、制药工程）
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、法语联合学士学位）
- 化学（化学、生工双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年北京化工大学在上海市大幅扩招至45人，位次预测区间12015–13015名。位次在区间下限（12015名以内）的考生可重点冲刺一档的计算机类、自动化类及宏德书院；位次在区间中段（约12500名）的考生以二档专业为主力选择，兼顾化工能源、先进材料等优势方向；位次在区间上限（13015名附近）的考生可重点考虑三档专业，绿色化学、生物与医药等方向录取概率较大。该校化工、材料学科实力突出，适合对化工、材料领域有兴趣的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai were 14212 → 13507 → 12442 → 10069 → 10506, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), reaching a recent peak of 10069 in 2024 before slightly falling back to 10506 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 3706 places over the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan in Shanghai has been continuously expanding: 13 in 2021 → 17 in 2022 → 17 in 2023 → 29 in 2024 → 34 in 2025 → 45 in 2026, with an increase of about 32.4% in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure and pushing ranking numbers upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in 2024, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving a teacher ethics survey but handled promptly; its Douyin popularity is high (ranked 7th overall), with a comprehensive popularity of about 7.39 million, high exposure on short video platforms, and education bloggers like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended it as a '211 with high cost-performance', drawing significant application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A (flagship discipline), Chemistry an A-, and Materials Science and Engineering an A-, totaling 3 disciplines rated A- or above, with outstanding strength in the chemical engineering field, highly matching the university's enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications continue to be highly recommended, but the university's main enrollment majors are in Engineering Experimental Classes (chemical engineering, materials, biology directions), and related broad categories (biology, chemistry, environment, materials) have a social popularity of 'clearly discouraged', which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the total number of candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, a significant increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core factor of a 32.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, the ranking number is expected to increase significantly compared to the 2025 baseline of 10506; however, factors such as the Soft Science ranking rising to 57th, high Douyin attention, and the 211 level advantage partially offset the downward shift in ranking. Based on supply-demand elasticity calculations, with slight adjustments for ranking rise and popularity factors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 12515, with a range of 12015–13015.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (including Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology)
- Automation (including Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy) (including Chemical Engineering and Technology Elite Class, Polymer Materials and Engineering Elite Class, Bioengineering Advanced Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials) (including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Energy) (including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Big Data and Intelligent Management) (including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry) (including Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biology and Medicine) (including Bioengineering, Biomedical Engineering, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, French Joint Bachelor's Degree)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Bioengineering Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Beijing University of Chemical Technology significantly expands enrollment in Shanghai to 45 students, with a predicted ranking range of 12015–13015. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 12015) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Automation, and Hongde Academy; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 12500) should consider Tier 2 majors as their main choice, while also considering advantageous directions like Chemical Engineering and Energy, and Advanced Materials; candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (around 13015) can focus on Tier 3 majors, with higher admission probabilities in directions like Green Chemistry, Biology and Medicine. The university has outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials, making it suitable for candidates interested in these fields.
